prompt:
Polished macOS Sonoma app screenshot — "WorkSpaces," a native Mac app for managing AI coding agent sessions. Standard macOS window with traffic-light buttons (red/yellow/green) at top-left, dark unified-compact toolbar, vibrancy. Three-column NavigationSplitView, all in dark mode:

LEFT SIDEBAR (240pt wide, background #1f1f21): "Repositories" section header in small uppercase secondary-color text. Repo rows are folder icons + names in SF Pro 13pt. Visible repos top-to-bottom: 'jrnlfish-v4' (collapsed, small green dot trailing right), 'bertram-chat' EXPANDED (with a YELLOW DOT trailing — this is bubbled child status), 'beads' (collapsed, YELLOW DOT bubbled trailing), 'bread-builder' (collapsed, RED DOT bubbled trailing), 'code-cadence' (no dot), 'dotclaude' (no dot), 'growing-guide' (no dot), 'planventura' (no dot). Under expanded 'bertram-chat' three indented child workspace rows: 'feature-auth' (selected, highlighted with a subtle blue accent bar/background, small blue glowing dot trailing — agent thinking), 'bugfix-422' (yellow dot trailing — awaiting input), 'refactor-state' (green dot trailing — idle). Status dots are tiny 7pt filled circles in vivid colors: green #30d158, blue #0a84ff (with subtle glow), yellow #ffd60a (with subtle glow), red #ff453a.

CENTER PANE (largest, terminal, background #0d0d0e): Dark terminal showing a Claude Code session. SF Mono 12pt text. Show:
  $ claude --resume
  Resuming session from 09:41 (3 hours ago)
  ● I've refactored AuthService into AuthCoordinator and AuthStore.
    Updated 4 callers. Tests passing. Ready for your review.
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  $ swift test
  Test Suite 'All tests' passed at 14:42.
       Executed 142 tests, 0 failures in 18.4 seconds.
  $ ▌
The ● bullet is in soft blue. Output text is light gray on near-black background.

RIGHT INSPECTOR PANE (~320pt, background #232325): Tabs at top — segmented picker style: 'Files | Changes·4 | Activity | Diag'. 'Changes' tab active (subtle accent underline). Below, a list of 4 changed files with file icons and small +N/-N indicators: 'AuthCoordinator.swift +42 -8', 'AuthStore.swift +38 NEW' (green NEW badge), 'LoginView.swift +3 -2', 'AuthCoordinatorTests.swift +28'. Subtle 1px separators between rows.

TOP TOOLBAR (CRITICAL DETAIL): macOS unified-compact toolbar with subtle blur. Left: a small inspector-toggle icon (sidebar.trailing SF Symbol). Center: window title 'feature-auth' in SF Pro 13pt semibold. RIGHT: a yellow capsule pill — small (about 32pt tall × 90pt wide), yellow tinted background (#ffd60a at ~18% opacity), thin yellow stroke (#ffd60a at ~35% opacity), inside: a tiny 7pt filled yellow circle on the left, then text '2 need you' in white SF Pro 12pt medium with monospaced digits. This pill is the new project-wide attention indicator.

STYLE NOTES: Looks like a real screenshot, not an illustration or mockup. Pixel-perfect rendering. Native macOS Sonoma dark mode aesthetics. SF Pro for all UI text, SF Mono for terminal text. Subtle 1px borders between the three columns in dark gray #2a2a2e. No fake gradients, no marketing chrome, no watermarks. Window has a subtle soft drop shadow on solid black background. Feels like Xcode meets Linear meets Terminal.app — calm, native, professional.
